titleStmt.title: SII 40.270: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 270. (A.R. No. B. 315 of 1933.) Nārṇepāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a broken Nandi pillar opposite to the temple of Bhīmēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1073, Uttarāyaṇa Sankrāṅti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Kumārēśvara (called Sōmēśvara in the Telugu portion of the record) of Nārāyaṇapāḍu by Mudunūri Kommanāmātya of Mudgala-gōtra, for the merit of his parents. The gift was entrusted to Sābenabōya, son of Prōliyabōya for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkāntā jaghana sthala sthagita līlāmēkhalōmaṁḍa
nāmātyō mudgalagōtrajō guṇanidhi śrīpāvulū
ri prabhuḥ tasyābhūttanayassupālita namōbhūdēva
dēvadrumassatyatyāgaparākrama kramakhaṇiḥ paḍlābhi
dhānakritī . Arundhatīnāsya babhūva kāntā pativratā
cāra vicāra vidhi śisṭēṣṭa vidvajjana kāmadhēnurvve
nnāṁbikā rājabhritōṁbikēva . tasyāṁ ca tasmājjaga
dutsavārtthaṁ jātaḥ kritaśrīmadamātya kommaḥssahai

vajātāssahasā guṇaughāssaha sthitāstēnasahū
rjitāśca . śākābdē guṇadātuṇadhara
śvanāthāṁkkitē śrī nārāyaṇapāṭi saṁjñatavatē viśvēśva
rāyadarāt . guvvartthaṁ kumarēśvarāya guravagōyyaḥ kritiḥ ko
mmanāmātya puṇyatarōttarāyaṇatithau paṁjagaddīpakaḥ . svasti śrī
śakavaruṣaṁmulu 1073 gunēṁṭi yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti nimittamuna nā
pastaṁba kulatilakuṇḍunu mudgaḷagōtruṇḍunu gōtrapavitruṇḍumanibudha
haricaṁddanuṇḍununaina mudunūri kommanāmātyuṇḍu dama tallidaṁḍrula
ku dharmmārtthaṁmugā śrī nārāyaṇapāṭi śrī sōmēśvara mahādēvaraku na
khaṇḍavarttiṁ dīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁkēkoni prōliyabō
yini koḍuku sābenabōyuṇḍu dana putrānupautrika mācaṁdrārkkamu
nityamānēṇḍu nēyi yī dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyaṁggalavāṇḍu .
Digital edition of SII 40.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
